_rationale: The >90% gate covers the PURE CORE the ticket names — the central-configuration model + catalogs (config.ts), the total config-op applier (apply.ts), the pure page-derivation/exclusion (pages.ts), the deterministic typed-command parser that makes the confidence signal headless-replayable (command.ts), the Realtime event decoder + config-tool decoding + session instructions (agent.ts), the wire casters (protocol.ts), and the TEA REDUCER (app.ts: model + update, tested by app.spec.ts). All IO is split OUT of the reducer into effects.ts (the Cmd builders + subscriptions) so the reducer stays pure and gated. Excluded, same as the fleet's other apps: effects.ts (fetch/WebRTC thunks that cannot run headless), view.ts (DOM render tree), vendors/ (WebRTC), entrypoints/ (node:http + fs), and main.ts (the mount line).
